task: Debug and fix Slack Chinese encoding garbled text
what_failed: PowerShell default US-ASCII silently destroys CJK in ConvertTo-Json
Didn't catch it proactively - user had to report
lesson: PowerShell $OutputEncoding defaults to US-ASCII. Any script handling non-ASCII (Chinese, emoji) must set $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8 before serialization.
